title: Truth Analysis
description: Derived result of deterministic structured-truth analysis (DEC-0011, DEC-0012, DEC-0013): open contradictions and gaps computed by Tier-0 code over explicitly structured fact slots, relative to one versioned truth profile and one validated lineage projection of the COMPLETE canonical claim set. Claim membership comes from a store-authoritative claim snapshot (claim_snapshot_ref + claim_set_digest), never from a caller-supplied array — a supplied subset is not evidence of completeness, and compilation reconciles the snapshot against the live store, failing closed on stale analyses. Current truth is derived from lineage heads, never from caller omission: the complete canonical set is recorded, effective claims are the only claims analyzed, superseded historical revisions and inactive heads (contradicted/rejected/expired/lifecycle-rejected) are listed explicitly for audit. No model, provider, or network field exists; contradictions are open until a human decision resolves them — the analyzer never selects a winner; claims without structured fact metadata are listed explicitly, never parsed by keyword or silently ignored.

truth_profile_ref.description: artifact_id of the truth profile this analysis is relative to; gaps exist only relative to it

claim_snapshot_ref.description: artifact_id of the claim-snapshot this analysis was derived from (DEC-0013): canonical claim membership comes from Artifact Store enumeration, never a caller-supplied array; analyzed_claim_refs must equal the snapshot's claim references

claim_set_digest.description: the referenced snapshot's aggregate claim-set digest, copied so the analysis is bound to the exact membership and contents it analyzed; compilation reconciles this against the live store and fails closed on any change (stale analysis)

analyzer_version.description: version label of the deterministic analyzer that produced this artifact

analyzed_claim_refs.description: the COMPLETE validated input claim revision set this analysis covered, deterministically sorted (semantic layer); duplicates are rejected. Exactly partitioned by effective_claim_refs, superseded_claim_refs, and inactive_head_claims (semantic layer, DEC-0012)

effective_claim_refs.description: validated lineage heads active as current truth (DEC-0012) — the only claims contradiction detection, slot satisfaction, and the unstructured/unprofiled listings see; deterministically sorted (semantic layer)

superseded_claim_refs.description: historical revisions superseded by another analyzed claim (DEC-0012); retained for audit, excluded from current truth; deterministically sorted (semantic layer)

inactive_head_claims.description: lineage heads retained for audit but inactive as current truth (DEC-0012), with a closed-enum reason; sorted by claim_ref (semantic layer). lifecycle 'superseded' is deliberately not a reason: a superseded head whose successor is missing from the complete set fails closed at projection instead of appearing here

open_contradictions.description: one entry per single-cardinality fact slot holding two or more distinct normalized values across EFFECTIVE claims; sorted by fact_key (semantic layer)

distinct_values.description: the distinct normalized values involved; JSON equality is type-sensitive, so string "1" and number 1 are distinct entries

description.description: deterministic human-readable description derived only from the fact key and counts — never invented evidence

blocking_publication.description: copied from the truth profile's blocking_if_conflicting; the analyzer assigns no blocking status of its own

status.description: fixed to open in this phase: resolution is a downstream human decision (INV-HUM-001(3))

gaps.description: missing or unverified required slots relative to the truth profile, evaluated over EFFECTIVE claims only — an inactive head satisfies nothing (DEC-0012); sorted by fact_key (semantic layer)

why_needed.description: copied from the truth profile slot's why_needed

blocking.description: copied from the truth profile's blocking_if_missing; the analyzer assigns no blocking status of its own

claim_refs.description: relevant unconfirmed effective claim references for unverified gaps; empty for missing gaps

unstructured_claim_refs.description: EFFECTIVE claims that could not participate because they lack structured fact metadata; listed explicitly, never keyword-parsed, text-compared, or silently ignored

unprofiled_fact_claim_refs.description: EFFECTIVE structured claims whose fact_key has no slot in the referenced truth profile; they were not contradiction- or gap-analyzed (the profile is workflow-scoped, not a universal ontology)

open_contradictions.description: single-cardinality fact slot 'identity.primary_name' carries 2 distinct normalized values across 2 eligible claims; resolution requires a human decision

gaps.what: no eligible structured claim supplies required fact slot 'market.default_locale'
gaps.why_needed: locale decides rendering direction and copy language defaults
